zh.Croston,Lancashire,England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾可洛斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Shaa於大約1470年出生在英國時，他的父親John Shaa16歲，母親Margaret Ilam14歲。他於1492年8月21日與Margret Harsnep在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可洛斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Croston,Lancashire,England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾可洛斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Shaa于大约1470年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Shaa16岁，母亲Margaret Ilam14岁。他于1492年8月21日与Margret Harsnep在英国英格兰藍卡爾可洛斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Shaa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from a short form of the personal name   Khoshaba   ‘Sunday’.
Albanian: from Shabë (definite form Shaba), a short form of the Muslim personal name Shaban .
Albanian: possibly also a nickname or metonymic occupational name from shaba ‘tripe’.

variants.name: Khoshaba
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from a personal name based on Syriac ḥōshābā ‘Sunday’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Shaa was born about 1470, in England, his father, John Shaa, was 16 and his mother, Margaret Ilam, was 14. He married Margret Harsnep on 21 August 1492, in Croston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Shaa est né environ 1470, à Angleterre, son père, John Shaa, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ilam, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Margret Harsnep le 21 août 1492, à Croston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Shaa um 1470 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shaa 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Ilam 14. Er hat am 21. August 1492 in Croston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margret Harsnep geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Shaa è nato il circa 1470 nel England, il suo padre, John Shaa, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Ilam, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Margret Harsnep il 21 agosto 1492, nel Croston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Shaaが約1470年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Shaaは16歳，母Margaret Ilamは14歳であった。1492年8月21日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクロストンでMargret Harsnepと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Shaa(이)가 대략 1470년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shaa(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Ilam(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1492년 8월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 Margret Harsnep(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Shaa nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shaa, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ilam, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Margret Harsnep em 21 de agosto de 1492, em Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Shaa родился около 1470 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Shaa было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ilam, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Margret Harsnep 21 августа 1492 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери.
